subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Lord! We are poor and Thou art the All-Rich, the All-Bountiful. We are powerless and Thou art the All-Strong, the Almighty. We are abased [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب رب نحن فقراء و انت الغنی الکریم و نحن عجزاء و انت القوی القدیر و نحن اذلاء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for teaching, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
